title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and meets production standards, not just whether it passes tests. It uses blocker criteria and maintainer-defined rubrics from 36 open-source repositories to evaluate code quality across multiple programming languages.
